benchmark_corrections: Use sequential and fork/join program traces.
Measure program JCT, throughput and p95/p99 starvation versus FCFS and MLFQ.

fidelity.summary: Group attained-service ordering is recognizable, but PLAS queue bands, quanta, demotion, starvation reset, and ATLAS critical-path state are absent.

entries.paper_claim: 4-15x program throughput improvement at equal latency

benchmark_corrections: Replay multi-turn tool-duration traces under memory pressure.
Compare LRU, fixed-2s, optimized and oracle TTL.
high_confidence_fixes: Store expiration timestamps, tool histories and pressure.
Implement the empirical-CDF TTL utility search.
Reclaim only enough unpinned objects.
fidelity.summary: The preempted, pinned, arrival ordering is present, but optimized TTL is reduced to a Boolean and expiry lacks time, history, pressure and same-program queue semantics.

entries.paper_claim: 1.12-3.66x response-time and 1.10-3.22x throughput improvement

benchmark_corrections: Exercise AND/OR DAGs with shared radix nodes and transfer overlap.
Measure workflow makespan and cache-stall time.
high_confidence_fixes: Hard-filter non-ready/loading work and honor max selections.
Represent shared-node STE plus GPU, CPU, loading and offloading states.
Reclaim only the required byte prefix.
fidelity.summary: The eviction tuple and prefetch intent resemble KVFlow, but Agent Step Graph aggregation and transfer states are absent.

entries.paper_claim: up to 1.83x single-workflow and 2.19x concurrent-workflow speedup

benchmark_corrections: Use the five paper workloads and Azure arrivals.
Measure RPS and mean/P99 E2E against distributed SGLang and vLLM.
high_confidence_fixes: Compute per-target L_i plus M_i plus P_i.
Break equal prefix hits by load.
Model future-request redirection.
fidelity.summary: The exploit/explore threshold is present, but exploration omits per-target profiled cost and exploitation omits least-load tie-breaking and post-placement behavior.

entries.paper_claim: 1.5-14.5x average-latency and 2-10x p99-latency improvement

benchmark_corrections: Execute complete batched DAGs on multiple workers.
Compare query-wise, op-wise, random and LSPF using makespan and token steps.
high_confidence_fixes: Run a whole-DAG reference planner.
Represent TRT sharing, profiled outputs, precedence delays and worker capacities.
fidelity.summary: One local ready/depth/reuse choice does not reproduce Helium's whole-DAG TRT planner, multi-worker assignment, nested sequences or capacity timeline.

entries.paper_claim: up to 1.56x end-to-end speedup and much larger gains over naive execution

benchmark_corrections: Replay ON/OFF, heterogeneous-length, Poisson and distribution-shift traces.
Measure service disparity versus the theorem bound, TTFT, throughput and utilization.
high_confidence_fixes: Implement Algorithm 2 counter lift and per-client FIFO state.
Charge weighted input at dispatch and output deltas during decode.
Filter feedback by request/progress semantics.
fidelity.summary: Minimum-counter ordering is recognizable, but the original implementation lacked counter lift, weighted costs, dispatch charging and iterative batch accounting.

entries.paper_claim: max-min token fairness across clients without sacrificing work conservation

benchmark_corrections: Use Qwen ChatBot, Qwen Agent, Bailian Coder and Kimi ToolAgent.
Test idle replicas and multi-decision hotspot sequences.
high_confidence_fixes: Implement artifact-equivalent batch-size plus one behavior.
Add popularity/cache-coverage history, confirmation and load-only fallback.
fidelity.summary: The P-token times batch-size core exists, but idle-replica semantics and the stateful two-phase hotspot detector are absent.

entries.paper_claim: 92%/24% lower mean TTFT/TPOT versus vLLM on ChatBot and 39%/51% lower means in production

benchmark_corrections: Use abusive users, overload intervals and multi-call applications.
Measure wasted tokens, queue delay, TTFT and prompt/decode throughput versus VTC and RPM.
high_confidence_fixes: Implement overload-gated user/application RPM throttling.
Preserve in-progress interactions.
Implement equations 2-3 with application-stage token accounting.
fidelity.summary: The original kernel confused interaction-aware throttling with an invented interference score and omitted OIT and application-stage WSC normalization.

entries.paper_claim: 1.03-1.75x overall throughput, with queue-delay gains measured separately versus VTC and RPM

benchmark_corrections: Use hybrid-model LMSys, ShareGPT and SWE-bench traces.
Compare timestamped LRU and artifact decision traces.
high_confidence_fixes: Implement speculative radix-tree admission.
Use normalized recency plus alpha times FLOP efficiency.
Support one-child eligibility, SSM-only reclaim and KV merging.
fidelity.summary: A reuse-times-FLOPs-per-byte knapsack replaces Marconi's separate speculative admission and recency-plus-FLOP-efficiency eviction.

entries.paper_claim: up to 34.4x token-hit-rate and 71.1% P95 TTFT improvement

benchmark_corrections: Use timestamped LRU and parent-child episodes.
Compare vLLM+Faiss and SGLang using TTFT and throughput.
high_confidence_fixes: Maintain GPU/host clocks, frequency and profiled average cost.
Iterate leaf eviction and expose newly eligible parents.
Represent GPU, host and free tiers.
fidelity.summary: A static lowest-score leaf resembles PGDSF, but clocks, updates, iterative frontier evolution and GPU-host hierarchy are missing.

entries.paper_claim: 1.2-4x TTFT and up to 2.1x throughput improvement

benchmark_corrections: Use stateful multi-client radix-tree traces.

Charge uncached extend and decode output tokens.
Maintain per-worker deficits and longest-prefix worker sets.
fidelity.summary: Deficit and locality signals are present, but the original implementation reversed locality-first ordering and omitted refill cycles, extend accounting and per-worker deficits.

entries.paper_claim: up to 2.87x throughput and 2.90-4.06x lower latency

benchmark_corrections: Run the mixed augmentation workload against vLLM, discard, preserve and swap.

high_confidence_fixes: Implement preserve and chunk-discard waste equations.
Allocate swap budget in descending minimum-waste order.
Separate FCFS resume queues and explicit preserve/swap/discard states.
fidelity.summary: The kernel conflates interception swap priority with resume scheduling and substitutes a non-paper reuse-versus-recompute predicate for preserve/swap/discard waste.

entries.paper_claim: 1.3-12x lower normalized latency and 1.6-2x higher throughput

benchmark_corrections: Use SGLang LPM+LRU and vLLM FCFS+APC+LRU.

high_confidence_fixes: Maintain pending-prefix state and exact cLPM facts.
Implement warm/pioneer/sibling ordering and stride lane interleaving.
Return only the capacity-required victim set.
fidelity.summary: Only the demand-and-fairness idea remains; pending trie, cLPM sections, stride lanes, dynamic fairness and ancestor-demand eviction are absent.

entries.paper_claim: up to 3x cache hit, 7.9x TTFT, 6.7x E2E, and 4.5x throughput improvement

benchmark_corrections: Run event-driven multi-model virtual queues.
Measure actual TTFT-SLO attainment, throughput, utilization, swaps and evictions versus EDF, FCFS and SHEPHERD.
high_confidence_fixes: Implement grouped virtual queues and equations 1-5 RWT estimation.
Implement equations 6-13 global assignment and ordering.
Model pulling, eviction, swapping and load balancing.
fidelity.summary: Independent SLO gates and scalar wait ordering do not implement request grouping, RWT estimation, virtual queues or the global LP.

entries.paper_claim: 40-90% higher SLO attainment and 20-400% higher throughput

benchmark_corrections: Replay multi-stage burst workloads.
Measure requests/GPU/s below 10% stage-SLO violations versus vLLM, Sarathi and DistServe.
high_confidence_fixes: Implement joint value-maximizing admission under memory and stage SLOs.
Generate mixed prefill/decode batches from a profiled performance model.
Add speculation and best-effort or replica fallback.

entries.paper_claim: about 2.2x average serving-capacity improvement

benchmark_corrections: Replay real intermediate answers and uncertainty.

Return the stable answer instead of cancelling it.
Represent reasoning programs and gang/SJF scheduling.
fidelity.summary: Thresholded termination remains, but Certaindex computation, stable-answer preservation, program-level knobs, gang scheduling and SJF are absent.

entries.paper_claim: 9-52% token reduction and up to 3.3x more queries at equal quality

benchmark_corrections: Replay bursty multi-module and DAG pipelines.

entries.paper_claim: 1.77x goodput over regulation-off and 1.48x over eager, above 95% SLO attainment

high_confidence_fixes: Generate exactly two adaptive-prefix hash candidates.
Implement the TTFT-SLO switch.

benchmark_corrections: Use evolving ShareGPT/BurstGPT queues versus round-robin, INFaaS and Llumnix-base.

entries.paper_claim: up to 15x prefill-latency, 2.9x end-to-end-latency, and 1.5x high-priority latency acceleration

high_confidence_fixes: Implement overload and likely-eviction guards.
Fallback to load balancing when either guard fails.
Represent global-tier fetch instead of active migration.
fidelity.summary: The first/follow-up split exists, but overload and eviction guards are absent and active migration differs from global-tier fallback routing.

entries.paper_claim: 24-37% lower median TTFT and up to 34% lower P99 TPOT

entries.paper_claim: up to 11.7x speedup and 1.8-2.4x batch speedup
